proposed_actions: Keep the hero eager-loaded and convert it to responsive AVIF/WebP derivatives if possible.
Preserve lazy loading for service photos, badge icons, logos, and footer media.
Avoid adding more imagery above the services section unless current assets are compressed further.

seo_optimization.content_intent: Help local visitors confirm services, brand support, and direct contact paths quickly.

proposed_actions: Keep the hero promise broad and let the services grid carry the detailed offer list.
Keep the brands and contact sections concise.
Do not introduce generic filler copy into the about or brands sections.
Preserve service-specific CTA labels on cards.
Retain fixed dimensions and eager loading.
Keep the burger menu script minimal and dependency-free.
Keep explicit width and height attributes on all images.
